query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Rapido founders booked in Nagpur over alleged illegal petrol bike taxi operations
articles.description: The FIR follows an RTO inspection that allegedly found a private two-wheeler being used as a commercial bike taxi without a valid licence or permit, prompting legal action under multiple laws.

articles.title: India seeks to quell public backlash on ethanol-mixed fuel after 'experiment' remark
articles.description: NEW DELHI: India's government on Friday (July 3) sought to contain a growing backlash against its mandatory use of 20 per cent ethanol-blended petrol, as consumers unhappy about lower fuel efficiency and vehicle performance planned a protest against the policy.

articles.title: ‘This is a scam’: Karnataka Congress chief demands rollback of E20 petrol over vehicle damage
articles.description: Terming the 20% ethanol-blend rollout an "experiment at the expense of motorists," Hariprasad targeted the Centre for lowering fuel mileage and driving up maint

articles.title: E20 petrol: Bhutan rejects India ethanol fuel offer
articles.description: Bhutan has declined offers from Indian oil companies to supply E20 petrol. The development comes at a time when India's E20 petrol mandate has sparked widespread debate over its impact on vehicle performance and mileage.

articles.title: Union Govt Seeks To Ease Public Backlash Over E-20 ‘Experiment’ Remark
articles.description: Indian Oil Corporation has launched a mass social media campaign with customers showing confidence in E20 Petrol

articles.title: Fuel prices explained: Why oil companies are still losing ₹19 on diesel and ₹6 on petrol
articles.description: State-run oil marketing companies (OMCs) lost an estimated ₹18.9 on every litre of diesel and ₹6 on every litre of petrol during the April-June quarter, even as pump prices remained largely unchanged. Here's how petrol and diesel are priced in India, and why OMCs can incur losses despite fluctuations in global crude oil prices.

articles.title: Jaipur man killed by SUV while fleeing road rage attack
articles.description: Mandal was reversing his car near the Narayan petrol pump on Vande Mataram Road when it allegedly brushed against another car behind him. | India News

articles.title: Rapido Founders Booked in Nagpur for Alleged Illegal Petrol Bike Taxi Operations Without Maharashtra Govt Nod
articles.description: Rapido founders have been booked in Nagpur after an RTO complaint alleged the bike taxi app operated petrol-powered services in Maharashtra without government approval, using private two-wheelers as commercial vehicles in violation of the Motor Vehicles Act and BNS provisions.

articles.title: Businesses having good summer as Americans travel closer to home
articles.description: The reported boost to domestic tourism, though anecdotal, comes as higher airfares and gasoline prices have made vacations more expensive.

articles.title: Dalal Street also smokes peace pipe, ends in green for 4th week in row
articles.description: Indian stock markets concluded their fourth consecutive week of gains, buoyed by declining crude oil prices and improved geopolitical sentiment. Analysts anticipate further upward movement for the Nifty 50, with upcoming quarterly earnings reports expected to guide market direction. Sectoral strength was observed in Realty, Pharma, Healthcare, and Cement, while broader market indices showed mixed performance. Foreign investors were net buyers, contrasting with domestic institutional selling.
